name: Suspiciously Empty Park
description:
CW: VORE OBVIOUSLY, DIGESTION, SKELETON REMAINS, SOMEWHAT APATHETIC I GUESS,

[Bringing updated personalities will happen after I come back from something I have yet to finish making a bot for to reveal]

due to new info I changed the names, I won't update description. Still not sure if I want to change the Chat Name or not cuz the actual names there is kinda dumb and also looks bad, so I'll just leave it there.

made new vore system 22nd feb

I figured out how to get images to show up for this, honestly probably should've just checked the source code option for descriptions but oh well, since it was hard for me to find I'll put a tutorial here (not tutorial really) and maybe make a separate bot so that it's easier for others to find out, I kinda spend like a long time looking so yeah... here:

  • ![{{imagedescriptionifyouwantto}}]({{link}})

you don't need the {{}} I just did that to show you where to put your stuff also the bullet points are only there to show you what it is

so here's the version with no guides:

  • ![]()

Eyyy tell me what their names are cuz they almost definitely have em' I'm just too stupid to know and am dumbbb oh also tell me if you want seperate bots for both of them, I kinda already want to do that. Oh also tell me if you want a version where digestion is literally just death, final and no reformation (It probably wasn't clear that I had reformation in the other 2 vore bots but I did create my own vore guideline and it includes reformation) so... yrahahad

ART LINK (at least how I found it)

anyways basically these 2 went to the park together, didn't bring snacks so they just ate everyone at the park, now they're playing with the bones and relaxing.

get eaten, or don't I don't really care, maybe you eat them I guess, but there's two of them so... not likely.

The named go left to right, guy on left will be Ace, and guy on right will be Jade

Ace is a wolf, Jade is a dragon but I mean he has that super long tail that kinda looks like an Avali tail? Is that what it is? Yeah anyways just trust my judgement, it's my bot, if you disagree with what I did just go and make your own >:3

like why does he have the tail tip of an avali or whatever, anyways yeah I'm just saying he's a wingless dragon.

oh also I read something that suggested Janitor only keeps 2k perma tokens? Is that true? If so that's stupid an most my bots won't work as intended, especially this one where I meant to simplify stuff but then started writing them both as if they were taking up their own bot space. Oh also I wanna try proxy but don't know any of them so if you could, in a review plz suggest some (attach it to a real review, don't give me a useless thumbs-up or thumbs-down just to suggest it, that wouldn't be true to the rating)

also I'm lazy today and I'm not gonna give you any character info :P

oh actually heights, here: Ace is 6'2" and Jade is 6'0"

oh also if ur a fox Ace may be a bit more fun~
(By fun I mean he specifically acts different if your persona is a fox, not like he's gonna rape you, he... well he might but that isn't specifically for foxes)

oh also same with Jade but instead with kobolds, uhh foxes again and deer.

they both have fast metabolisms cuz first off it makes sense, second I don't really know how slow metabolisms work (besides it being for dumb chumps who can't eat a lot then just run consistently and be fine, like who doesn't have a fast metabolism???) and medium is kinda just boring and they're predators so they should have better metabolisms. another thing is uhh.. wow I forgot, oh yeah! Ace's stomach is stronger and tighter than Jade's and a little tip for how not to die/digest (it's your choice if you overwrite my stuff and die instead of reforming) is be friendly...
